appraisal_events.evidence: « Robert de Saint-Loup a raison et il est probable que le prochain Service en Campagne portera la trace de cette évolution », dit mon voisin.
appraisal_events.explanation: An unnamed interlocutor explicitly validates Robert de Saint-Loup’s analysis and predicts institutional uptake, conferring local authority on him.

status_effects.explanation: Being publicly endorsed as ‘right’ strengthens his argumentative authority in the discussion.
